identity: Radiant human male paladin, golden-blond hair, serene confident face, bright blue eyes. Tall muscular build.
outfit: Polished silver plate armor with golden sunburst emblem on the breastplate, white tabard trimmed in gold, gold pauldrons. White cape with gold lining.
weapons: A silver-headed warhammer with an engraved sunburst crest, held in the right hand, haft resting against the shoulder.
attackStyle: East-facing. Warhammer swung in a high overhead arc, both hands on the haft. Golden light trails the head.
spellStyle: East-facing. Left hand raised palm-up with a floating golden sunburst rune; warhammer planted on the ground by his side.
blockStyle: East-facing. Warhammer held horizontally in both hands across the torso as a guard, chin down, golden tabard gleaming.
koStyle: East-facing, on both knees, head bowed, warhammer fallen beside him. White cape pooled on the ground.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm noble idle. Warhammer resting head-down at his feet, both hands on the haft. Sunburst emblem glowing softly.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Serene face, blond hair, silver plate and gold sunburst on chest.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Radiant human male paladin, golden-blond hair, serene confident face, bright blue eyes. Tall muscular build.

OUTFIT: Polished silver plate armor with golden sunburst emblem on the breastplate, white tabard trimmed in gold, gold pauldrons. White cape with gold lining.

WEAPONS: A silver-headed warhammer with an engraved sunburst crest, held in the right hand, haft resting against the shoulder.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Radiant human male paladin, golden-blond hair, serene confident face, bright blue eyes. Tall muscular build.

OUTFIT: Polished silver plate armor with golden sunburst emblem on the breastplate, white tabard trimmed in gold, gold pauldrons. White cape with gold lining.

WEAPONS: A silver-headed warhammer with an engraved sunburst crest, held in the right hand, haft resting against the shoulder.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Serene face, blond hair, silver plate and gold sunburst on chest.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
